line: // Startup and self-test use ordinary legal transitions.
/* Mainline scheduling favors a contact-window workflow. */
// Bidirectional legal edges permit normal operator correction.
// Main-to-main edges mark the preferred symmetric route.
/* One-way reverse arrows make the edge's authority explicit. */
// Mixed edge kinds connect subsystems while preserving direction semantics.
// Probability annotations model noisy links and retry policy.
/* Labels may be atoms or quoted human-facing descriptions. */
// Embedded outcalls bind application hooks to state-machine actions.
// Command uplink pipeline runs alongside telemetry downlink.
// Reporting and cleanup complete the real-world lifecycle.
/* Atom punctuation coverage appears naturally in operational state names. */
// Final loop carries Unicode in actions without sacrificing machine shape.
